---
title: "Ideas & Experiments"
---

Applied projects at the intersection of data, development, and public policy.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Spatial Targeting Tool for Togo

*A composite priority index combining census, satellite, and geospatial data to rank territories by vulnerability — supporting evidence-based allocation of social and infrastructure investments.*

---

```{=html}
<details style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
  <summary style="cursor:pointer; font-weight:600; color:#002366; font-size:1rem; padding:0.6rem 0; list-style:none; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;">
    <span>▶</span> Methodology
  </summary>
  <div style="padding:1rem 1.2rem; border-left:3px solid #002366; margin-top:0.5rem; color:#333; line-height:1.7;">
    <p>Each indicator is normalized to a 0–1 scale and aggregated into a weighted composite score. Territorial units are then ranked and classified into quintiles — the top quintile identifies areas of overlapping deprivation.</p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:0;">The index operates at two scales: <strong>canton</strong> (national coverage) and <strong>neighborhood</strong> (Greater Lomé).</p>
  </div>
</details>

<details style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
  <summary style="cursor:pointer; font-weight:600; color:#002366; font-size:1rem; padding:0.6rem 0; list-style:none; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;">
    <span>▶</span> Inputs
  </summary>
  <div style="padding:1rem 1.2rem; border-left:3px solid #002366; margin-top:0.5rem;">
    <table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:0.92rem;">
      <thead>
        <tr style="border-bottom:2px solid #002366;">
          <th style="text-align:left; padding:0.4rem 0.8rem; color:#002366;">Indicator</th>
          <th style="text-align:left; padding:0.4rem 0.8rem; color:#002366;">Source</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:0.4rem 0.8rem;">Population & poverty</td><td style="padding:0.4rem 0.8rem; color:#555;">RGPH 2022, EHCVM</td></tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:0.4rem 0.8rem;">Nighttime lights</td><td style="padding:0.4rem 0.8rem; color:#555;">NASA VIIRS</td></tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:0.4rem 0.8rem;">Relative wealth</td><td style="padding:0.4rem 0.8rem; color:#555;">Meta RWI</td></tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:0.4rem 0.8rem;">Service accessibility</td><td style="padding:0.4rem 0.8rem; color:#555;">OpenStreetMap</td></tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:0.4rem 0.8rem;">Road network</td><td style="padding:0.4rem 0.8rem; color:#555;">OpenStreetMap</td></tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:0.4rem 0.8rem;">Flood risk</td><td style="padding:0.4rem 0.8rem; color:#555;">GFD / FATHOM</td></tr>
        <tr><td style="padding:0.4rem 0.8rem;">Built-up density</td><td style="padding:0.4rem 0.8rem; color:#555;">GHSL</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</details>

<details style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
  <summary style="cursor:pointer; font-weight:600; color:#002366; font-size:1rem; padding:0.6rem 0; list-style:none; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;">
    <span>▶</span> Results
  </summary>
  <div style="padding:1rem 1.2rem; border-left:3px solid #002366; margin-top:0.5rem; color:#555; font-style:italic;">
    Coming soon.
  </div>
</details>
```

:::
